use_cases: Visualizing conversion funnels with animated metric counters
Tracking user drop-off through multi-stage processes
Displaying sales pipeline stages with trend indicators
Showing website visitor progression through marketing funnels
Presenting data filtering hierarchies in analytics dashboards
ai_summary: A data visualization funnel chart component built with Reaviz library, featuring animated count-up metrics, trend arrows, and metric tag icons. Designed for analytics dashboards to visualize conversion funnels, user drop-off rates, and multi-stage processes with interactive hover effects and scroll-triggered animations.
